Marianne Moore

Bridal Pricelist

Bridal trial make-up and consultation is best done at least 3-4 weeks before the wedding.

Email me

  • Make-up trials

    £35 ea.

    For brides, the bridal party or special guests. A perfect opportunity to discuss the make-up for your special day.

  • Bridal make-up

    £150

    On the day. This includes false lashes if required.

  • Bridal party and special guests make-up

    £50 ea.

    On the day. This includes false lashes if required.

Lessons Pricelist

A personalised consultation with me. You will learn step-by-step how to accentuate your features, gain confidence in your application skills and how to make the most of the make-up you currently own.

Email me

  • One on One

    £250

    A comprehensive 2.5hr tutorial covering the most important aspects of daily beauty, from skin care to colour.

  • Group

    £POA

    A 2.5hr group session covering the same material as the 'One on One' classes. Great for a group of ladies who are looking for a make-up update.

Prices listed are subject to change based on reasonable travel expenses. Any changes will be made clear at the time of booking.
